differential_diagnoses: Hypertrophic cardiomyopathy (phenocopy, e.g., Danon disease or Fabry disease)
next_steps: Technetium-99m pyrophosphate (PYP) scan to evaluate for cardiac amyloidosis
Serum and urine protein electrophoresis with immunofixation
Cardiac magnetic resonance imaging with T1 mapping and extracellular volume quantification
Genetic testing for transthyretin (TTR) mutations and lysosomal storage disorders
Endomyocardial biopsy if non-invasive workup is inconclusive

differential_diagnoses: Restrictive cardiomyopathy due to another storage disorder
next_steps: Right heart catheterization with pressure-volume analysis to differentiate restriction from constriction
Technetium-99m pyrophosphate (PYP) scan to evaluate for ATTR amyloidosis
Serum and urine protein electrophoresis with immunofixation and serum free light chain assay
Cardiac PET/CT to evaluate for sarcoidosis
Cardiac MRI with T1 mapping and extracellular volume quantification
Genetic testing for TTR mutations and lysosomal storage disorders (including GLA for Fabry)
